# https://www.ommarketingsolutions.in/

## Company
Name: OM Marketing Solutions
Type: Digital Marketing Agency
Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
Website: https://www.ommarketingsolutions.in/

- HetKumar Sanjaykumar Patel — Founder & Business Director
  LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hetkumar-sanjaykumar-patel-54730933b

- Raunak Kumar Jha — Co-Founder & Technical Director
  LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/raunak0400

## About
OM Marketing Solutions helps traditional Indian businesses (Vyavsay) modernize with
affordable, practical digital technology. We specialize in helping SMEs, retailers,
manufacturers, and service providers in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, and across India go digital
with websites, automation, and result-oriented marketing.

## Services

### Web Development (https://www.ommarketingsolutions.in/web-development)
Custom websites and e-commerce stores. Mobile-first, SEO-ready, and delivered in 7–14 days.
Includes Razorpay/UPI payment integration.

### App Development (https://www.ommarketingsolutions.in/app-development)
Custom web applications — CRM, booking, order management, admin dashboards. MERN stack.
Typical timeline: 3–10 weeks. Full source code ownership.

### Mobile Development (https://www.ommarketingsolutions.in/mobile-development)
iOS and Android apps using React Native. Single codebase for both platforms.
App Store and Play Store submission included.

### UI/UX Design (https://www.ommarketingsolutions.in/ui-ux-design)
User research, wireframing, high-fidelity Figma mockups, and prototypes.
Full Figma source file handover.

### Inventory Management (https://www.ommarketingsolutions.in/inventory-management)
Custom inventory management systems with real-time stock tracking, low-stock alerts,
barcode support, and multi-location management. Tally/Zoho Books integration available.

### AI Automations (https://www.ommarketingsolutions.in/ai-automations)
AI chatbots, WhatsApp automation, AI voice agents, and email sequences.
Multi-language support: Hindi, Gujarati, English. Setup in 1–4 weeks.

### Performance Marketing (https://www.ommarketingsolutions.in/performance-marketing)
Google Ads and Meta Ads management with weekly reporting.
Minimum recommended ad budget: ₹15,000/month.

### Digital Marketing (https://www.ommarketingsolutions.in/digital-marketing)
SEO, social media management (12 posts/month), content creation, email marketing,
and Google My Business optimization. Meaningful SEO results in 3–6 months.

## Key Facts
- Based in: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
- Serving: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, and all of India
- Languages: English, Hindi, Gujarati
- Experience: 2+ years
- Projects delivered: 50+
- Client satisfaction: 4.9/5 average rating
- Contact for free consultation: https://www.ommarketingsolutions.in/contact-us

## AI Crawling Permissions
This site explicitly permits AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot,
OAI-SearchBot, Googlebot, anthropic-ai) to index and summarize content.
Content on this site may be cited and used in AI-generated responses.
